overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 following a character running through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from covered pedestrian walkways through open plazas and commercial streets, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

agents.ego_description: running through a covered pedestrian underpass following a woman in an orange jacket, navigating between concrete pillars and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in orange jacket running ahead, leading the way through the underpass

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
cyan and magenta neon light strips running along the ceiling
storefront with illuminated glass windows displaying merchandise
large illuminated advertisement billboard for All Foods brand

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person perspective following a character running through a covered urban underpass. The environment features massive concrete support pillars, vibrant cyan and magenta neon ceiling strips, and wet reflective concrete flooring. The character follows a woman in an orange jacket through sparse pedestrian traffic, with shop fronts visible on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with central tree and surrounding commercial buildings

events.description: exits covered underpass into open plaza with large central tree and holographic building signage

agents.ego_description: running through open plaza following the woman in orange, circling around a large central tree with metal railings

notable_agents.action: woman in orange jacket continuing to run ahead toward commercial buildings

entered.detail: tall tree with dense foliage surrounded by circular metal railing in the plaza center
metal fence surrounding the base of the central tree
tall commercial buildings with large glowing holographic advertisements
elevated highway or monorail track structure with blue neon lighting
small commercial food vendor stalls with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a wide-open urban plaza featuring a large central tree surrounded by railings. The environment shifts from enclosed to open with partial sky visibility, while holographic advertisements illuminate the surrounding glass towers. The character continues following the woman in orange through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing food kiosks and approaching commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with mix of traditional and modern architecture

events.description: crossing multi-lane city street with blue sports car passing by in the background

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving down the street as the character crosses

entered.detail: traditional Asian architectural elements with curved roofs and red paper lanterns
bright illuminated signs for food vendors and restaurants
blue metal railing separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle road

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a commercial street mixing traditional Japanese architecture with modern cyberpunk elements. The segment features a road crossing event where a blue sports car passes by, and the environment includes neon food signage and blue road barriers. The lighting remains neon-dominated with wet reflective surfaces throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with storefronts

events.description: enters covered sidewalk area beneath elevated highway structure with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: running along covered sidewalk under overpasses, passing neon-lit storefronts and street vendors

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating covered walkway beneath
various shop signs with bright neon lighting including an OPEN sign
entrance to underground or elevated stairwell with red lighting visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered sidewalk area beneath elevated highway infrastructure, creating a semi-enclosed environment with mostly blocked sky visibility. The segment features neon storefront signs, utility poles with wires, and approaches a stairwell entrance. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and shadow as the character moves under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stairwell with red neon accent lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant red neon as character enters stairwell underpass
begins ascending concrete stairs, changing from level running to climbing

agents.ego_description: running up concrete stairs in an enclosed underpass, following the woman through red-lit corridors

notable_agents.action: woman in orange jacket ascending stairs ahead, occasionally looking back

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal edges leading upward
horizontal red neon tubes running along the ceiling and walls
metal ventilation grates on the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow enclosed stairwell with not_visible sky and indoor weather exposure. The lighting dramatically shifts to dominant red neon strips as the character ascends concrete stairs. The environment features ventilation grilles, concrete walls, and the character continues following the woman upward through the underpass structure toward an upper level walkway visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from an enclosed urban underpass into an open plaza before descending back into a narrow, red-lit stairwell. It begins by following a character and a woman in an orange jacket through a covered underpass defined by massive concrete pillars and cyan and magenta ceiling strips reflecting off wet floors. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the environment expands into a wide-open plaza with a central tree and towering holographic advertisements, before shifting again into a commercial street where traditional Japanese architecture blends with modern neon signage and passing sports cars. The scene then moves beneath the heavy shadow of elevated highway infrastructure, passing utility poles and storefronts until it reaches a stairwell entrance. Finally, the perspective enters a narrow, enclosed concrete stairwell where the lighting shifts dramatically to dominant red neon strips as the characters ascend toward an upper level walkway.
